EmailTemplate.name: ARRH - Contract application confirmation [members]
EmailTemplate.subject: Thank you for your application
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
THANKS FOR YOUR APPLICATION.
Hi {!Candidate.FirstName}, We have received your application for the [Contract name] contract. One of our consultants will review your application and reach out should they require any further details.
Meanwhile, if you have any questions at all you can always call our friendly staff on 07 4998 5550.
Kind regards, Your team at Alliance Rural & Remote Health
